title: Evolve event schemas compatibly
description: Event payloads change only in backward/forward-compatible ways so old and new producers and consumers coexist.
body: Use when adding or changing fields on a published event. Do not rename or remove a field, change its type, or repurpose it in place, since in-flight and replayed events and lagging consumers will break. Actions: add new fields as optional with defaults, keep old fields until all consumers migrate, version the event type when a breaking change is unavoidable, and run a schema-compatibility check in CI. Validation signals include a compatibility test that a new consumer reads an old event and an old consumer ignores a new optional field. Risk boundary: a breaking schema change on a live topic can crash every consumer and replay; escalate before deploying.
